case_title: MARIA MELENDEZ VS. DOROTHY TUCKER-HUTCHON et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELENDEZ, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUCKER-HUTCHON, DOROTHY HUTCHON, LONARD $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, THE PLAINTIFF'S 1990 MERCURY COUGAR HAS A VALUE THAT EXCEEDS IT DEPRECIATION IN VALUE AS IT HAS BEEN MODIFIED TO ACCOMMODATE THE SPECIAL NEEDS OF THE HANDICAPPED OWNER AND IT HAS BEEN EXCEPTIOANLLY MAINTAINED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELENDEZ, MARIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MELENDEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER-HUTCHON, DOROTHY HUTCHON, LONARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED NOV-18-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUTCHON, LONARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED NOV-18-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER-HUTCHON, DOROTHY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TUCKER-HUTCHON, DOROTHY HUTCHON, LONARD
